notes: Structured evidence supports the issue #142 validated claim for a narrow reporting-platform specialist.
Authority sources are public, vendor-official, and recorded with publisher, authority reason, refresh interval, decay policy, and review date.
Human verification is recorded and all 12 evaluation scenarios passed above the 0.92 minimum pass-rate threshold with no unreviewed regressions.
Deployment and commercialization artifacts are present and aligned to the repository delivery contract.
Shared meta-agent use is explicitly optional; fallback behavior preserves safe startup and conservative escalation when delegated outputs are stale or unavailable.
